title: Always Audacious
writer: Thomas J. Geraghty, Ben Ames Williams
actors: Wallace Reid, Margaret Loomis, Clarence Geldert
plot: Reckless heir of an influential San Francisco family, Perry Danton must prove his worth by taking a job with the family lawyer before he is entrusted with the Danton fortune. When Perry's fiancée Camilla mistakes criminal Slim Attuck
